headline: Bitcoin Nears $63.5K Amid Monday Sell-Off Fears

article.title: Bitcoin nears $63.5K into weekly close as trader warns of 'terrible' Monday
article.summary: Bitcoin reached its highest levels in nearly a fortnight over the weekend, but BTC price action faced an "absolutely terrible" Monday track record.

headline: South Africa Eyes Crypto Tax Rule By Year-End

article.title: South Africa proposes crypto tax guidance under existing framework
article.summary: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.

headline: Oil Plunges 3% as Hormuz Flows Resume

article.title: Oil Drops as Flows in Hormuz Persist and OPEC+ Flags More Supply
article.summary: Oil fell as energy flows through the Strait of Hormuz persisted and OPEC+ signaled higher supplies, fanning concerns about a potential glut.

headline: Oil Slides 2% on OPEC Supply Boost

article.title: Oil Edges Lower on OPEC Increase, Dollar Steady: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Oil opened lower as energy flows through the Strait of Hormuz persisted and OPEC+ signaled higher supplies. Traders were also focused on the Korean won’s first day of 24-hour trading.

headline: $100M Crypto At Risk: Malware Hits Mac Clipboard

article.title: Fake Mac Clipboard App Delivers New Password-Stealing Malware
article.summary: A new Mac infostealer dubbed PamStealer impersonates the open-source Maccy clipboard manager to steal passwords and more.

headline: Bitcoin Surges Toward $53K Amid Rising Exchange Deposits

article.title: Bitcoin to $53K? Exchange Deposits Jump as Analysts Warn of Increased Volatility
article.summary: Bitcoin bounced back above $60,000 this week, but increased volatility might be on the way as crypto deposits to exchanges spike.

headline: Ethereum Revamp to Rival Merge in 3-4 Years

article.title: Vitalik Buterin says Ethereum’s next rebuild will rival the Merge, and take three to four years
article.summary: He said quantum safety has "shifted up a LOT in priority" and that Hegota, slated for later this year, will likely be Ethereum's last "pre-Lean" hard fork.

headline: Bitcoin ETFs Sink 8 Weeks Straight Amid Inflows

article.title: Bitcoin ETFs log record eighth straight negative week despite large Thursday inflow
article.summary: Hyperliquid ETFs took in $4.3 million, their smallest week since launching in May, down from a record $111 million the week before.
